title: Let Me Use It!
description: Disable items cooldown system if you are in creative mode.
body:
Sick of having to wait for it to cool down every time you test an item (e. g. Ender Pearl) in creative mode?

This mod resolves this by disabling all the items cooldown for the creative players in the game.
[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
